grant_title: Community Development Block Grant (CDBG) Annual Action Plan FY 2026
project_area: Community development, housing, public facilities, public services, and economic development
demographic_requirements: Extremely low-, low-, and moderate-income households; homeless persons; persons with special needs
eligibility_summary: Funds are allocated to improve housing and living conditions for low- and moderate-income residents, upgrade public facilities, expand public services, and promote economic development. Eligible applicants include non-profits, local governments, and public agencies operating within Camden County. Public input is encouraged during the review period.
